steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT REPORT_DATE, COMPANY_NAME, TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED, TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY, (TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED - TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY) AS SHARES_OUTSTANDING FROM CVM_SHARE_COMPOSITION WHERE CNPJ = '08.534.605/0001-74' AND REPORT_DATE = (SELECT MAX(REPORT_DATE) FROM CVM_SHARE_COMPOSITION WHERE CNPJ = '08.534.605/0001-74' AND REPORT_DATE <= '2024-12-31');"}}
steps.name: cvm_composition_query_tool

steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT ACCOUNT_NAME, SUM(ACCOUNT_VALUE) AS VALUE FROM DFP_ITR_CVM WHERE CNPJ = '08.534.605/0001-74' AND ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE IS NOT NULL AND REPORT_DATE = (SELECT MAX(REPORT_DATE) FROM DFP_ITR_CVM WHERE CNPJ = '08.534.605/0001-74' AND REPORT_DATE <= '2024-12-31') GROUP BY ACCOUNT_NAME ORDER BY ACCOUNT_NAME;"} }
steps.name: cvm_base_query_tool

steps.output:

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 2024-12-31 | RENOVA ENERGIA S.A. | 249483956 | 0 | 249483956 |
'}

steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT ACCOUNT_NAME, SUM(ACCOUNT_VALUE) AS VALUE FROM DFP_ITR_CVM WHERE CNPJ = '08.534.605/0001-74' AND REPORT_DATE = (SELECT MAX(REPORT_DATE) FROM DFP_ITR_CVM WHERE CNPJ = '08.534.605/0001-74' AND REPORT_DATE <= '2024-12-31') AND (UPPER(ACCOUNT_NAME) LIKE '%RECEITA%' OR UPPER(ACCOUNT_NAME) LIKE '%CUSTO%' OR UPPER(ACCOUNT_NAME) LIKE '%LUCRO%' OR UPPER(ACCOUNT_NAME) LIKE '%DESPESA%') GROUP BY ACCOUNT_NAME ORDER BY ACCOUNT_NAME;"}}
steps.name: cvm_base_query_tool
